name: CLI Update
summary: Successfully updated meeting_cli.py to support v3 pipeline commands while maintaining backward compatibility with legacy pipeline

tasks.notes: Completely refactored CLI with v3 commands clearly separated from legacy commands

tasks.task: Replace old stage/process with new pipeline
tasks.notes: New v3 pipeline commands implemented alongside preserved legacy commands for transition period
All new v3 commands implemented with proper module integration and error handling

tasks.task: Update status command for v3 manifests
tasks.notes: Status now shows both v3 and legacy pipeline counts with proper manifest schema detection
All legacy commands preserved with [LEGACY] labels, full backward compatibility maintained

acceptance_criteria.all_new_commands_work: ✅ ingest, identify, gate, tick commands all implemented with proper help text
acceptance_criteria.status_shows_v3_manifest_info: ✅ Status command detects v3 manifests and shows separate pipeline counts
acceptance_criteria.dry_run_on_all_commands: ✅ --dry-run flag implemented on all v3 commands with preview functionality
acceptance_criteria.help_text_updated: ✅ Comprehensive help text with v3 workflow examples and legacy compatibility notes

v3_pipeline_integration.ingest_module: Uses TranscriptIngestor class with ingest_file/ingest_folder methods
v3_pipeline_integration.identify_module: Integrates calendar_match and crm_enricher modules sequentially
v3_pipeline_integration.gate_module: Uses QualityGate class with execute method for validation
v3_pipeline_integration.tick_automation: Automatically processes next meeting in queue through appropriate pipeline stages

status_detection.v3_manifest_detection: Checks for $schema='manifest-v3' field to differentiate from legacy manifests
status_detection.status_counting: Separate counters for v3 (ingested/identified/gated/complete) and legacy (staged/processing/complete) statuses

backward_compatibility.legacy_commands_preserved: stage, process, archive, fix, pull all maintained with [LEGACY] labels
backward_compatibility.interface_unchanged: All existing command interfaces preserved for smooth transition
backward_compatibility.dual_pipeline_support: CLI handles both v2 and v3 manifests appropriately

testing_performed: All command help text verified working
Status command tested showing both pipeline types
CLI argument parsing validated for all new commands
Module integration points tested (ingest, calendar_match, crm_enricher, quality_gate)
Backward compatibility verified for existing legacy commands
dependencies_satisfied: D3.1 - Ingest module integrated via TranscriptIngestor class
D3.2 - Calendar triangulation integrated via calendar_match module
D3.3 - CRM enricher integrated via crm_enricher module
D3.4 - Quality gate integrated via QualityGate class
cli_examples_added: meeting_cli.py tick --dry-run                      # Process next in queue
next_steps: CLI ready for v3 pipeline usage. Teams can begin using new commands while legacy commands remain available for transition period.
